content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "GCD Counting". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/1101/problem/D
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n. The second line contains n integers.
content.outputFormat: Print the count of pairs of numbers with a GCD of 1.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Use the concept of GCD and iterate through all pairs of numbers to count the pairs with a GCD of 1.
